🎯 DFS Goal

Build a low-friction, games-first experience that turns casual fans into habitual players, drives durable engagement well beyond major sporting events, and serves as a trusted on-ramp into Sportsbook and Markets, competing on product quality rather than promotional spend.

📊 Project Status
AMBER
Finalizing product requirements along with designs for Alpha by 5/15  - Most of the Fantasy FE Team is onboarding this week  - Fantasy Team Engineering is completing Alpha Feature breakdown by 5/15  - Looking to bring in launch from 9/9 to 9/1 in order to support outreach before the start of the NFL season. Need to review with all engineering teams before committing to this updated timeline. - Request from shared services to borrow 2-3 engineers for 2 sprints in order to mitigate the risk of missing the Beta deadline. Currently exploring internally impacts and if this can be supported.
Auto-saved locally · border color reflects project status at time of entry
🎯 Next Steps
Complete analysis/impacts if we do send over engineers to support shared services.  Complete analysis/impacts for potentially bringing in the public launch date from 9/9 to 9/1.
Auto-saved locally
⚡ DAIR
Decisions Actions Issues Risks
Pulled in public launch from 9/9 to 9/1 and targeting to launch in two states (FL, GA) on 9/1.  CA, OR, RI on 9/2 and the rest of the states on 9/3 (AL, AK, AR, DE, ME, MN, MS NE, NH, NM, MD, OK, SC, SD, TX, UT, WI)
FTP Game will be for Post Launch
RAD integration will take place post launch. Will use playmaker for launch
Timeline for Fuel event pages not aligned with Alpha. Will have Fuel powered event pages in place for Beta
Sending three BE Fantasy engineers to shared services starting M30.3 and will support the shared services team for two sprints. This is needed to mitigate risk for the shared servcies team for Beta launch deliverables.(TBC)
Auto-saved locally
